name: Godfather Pawn Jewelry & Gun 10% Loans
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop chain across Central Florida offering collateral-based loans at 10% interest, plus buying and selling of jewelry, firearms, electronics, and musical instruments since 2008.
description_long:
Godfather Pawn is a family-owned and operated pawn shop network established in 2008, operating six locations across Central Florida including Orlando, Daytona Beach, Port Orange, Cocoa, and surrounding areas. The company positions itself as a full-service pawn operation with expertise in precious metals, firearms, electronics, and collectibles. They emphasize fair appraisal, quality inventory screening, and personalized customer service guided by experienced appraisers who claim to detect counterfeits and assess items comprehensively before purchase or loan origination.

Godfather Pawn offers three primary transaction types: secured loans (15-day terms at 10% interest), buying items outright, and selling quality used and new merchandise. Their loan product requires only a valid photo ID and collateral—no credit checks—making it accessible to customers regardless of credit history. They accept a wide range of collateral including jewelry, watches, bullion, firearms, vehicles, boats, musical instruments, and electronics. They also conduct estate buyouts and offer online appraisal services.

The company differentiates itself through specialized licensing for firearms transactions in Florida, claiming full certification and compliance with legal requirements for handguns, rifles, shotguns, and other legal firearms. They emphasize their 10% interest rate as "one of the lowest rates you'll find" in the pawn industry and highlight rapid funding for customers needing quick cash. Their appraisal methodology explicitly considers composition, clarity, cut, weight, and provenance when valuing precious metals and diamonds.

However, prospective borrowers should understand that pawn loans, even at 10% for 15 days, carry high annualized rates (~240% APR if rolled over). The company's website lacks specific information about loan renewal terms, default consequences, or redemption deadlines. No third-party ratings, complaints data, or licensing verification details are provided on the website itself. The 15-day loan term creates pressure for quick repayment, which may not suit all borrowers' financial situations.
address: 9421 S Orange Blossom Trl #1, Orlando, FL 32837

company_info.headquarters: 9421 S Orange Blossom Trl #1, Orlando, FL 32837

pros: 10% interest rate on 15-day loans positioned as competitive within the pawn industry
No credit checks required; accepts borrowers regardless of credit standing
Multi-location network (6 locations) across Central Florida for convenience
Specialized licensing and certification for legal firearm transactions in Florida
Accepts diverse collateral including vehicles, boats, and estate items beyond typical jewelry/electronics
Emphasis on expert appraisal with thorough inspection for counterfeits and flaws before purchase
Online appraisal service available, reducing need for in-person visits
cons: 10% for 15 days equals ~240% annualized APR if loan rolls over, creating debt trap risk
Website lacks transparency on loan renewal policies, default consequences, and redemption deadlines
No third-party ratings, complaint history, or BBB/regulatory verification shown on website
15-day loan term creates aggressive repayment pressure unsuitable for many financial emergencies
Limited information about actual item valuations, typical loan amounts, or LTV ratios
best_for: Borrowers with valuable collateral (jewelry, firearms, instruments) needing short-term bridge loans with same-day or next-day funding
Individuals seeking to sell or pawn firearms who require licensed, legal-compliant transactions in Florida
Estate sellers or bulk sellers of precious metals, jewelry, or collectibles seeking rapid appraisal and cash buyout
diagnosis: Godfather Pawn is best for customers with valuable tangible collateral who need immediate cash and can repay within 15 days. Critical caveat: the 10% rate is only for the 15-day term; annualized this exceeds 240% APR, making it a short-term emergency solution only, not a sustainable credit product. Verify licensing and check for complaint history before engaging.
services: 15-day secured loans at 10% interest with no credit check
Gold, silver, and diamond appraisal and buying
Firearm sales, purchases, and pawn loans (fully licensed and certified)
Jewelry buying, selling, and pawning including engagement and wedding rings
